members.name: GetPopup
members.summary: Returns the [PopupMenu] contained in this button. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member Window.visible] property.

members.name: SetDisableShortcuts
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shortcuts are disabled and cannot be used to trigger the button.

members.name: ShowPopup
members.summary: Adjusts popup position and sizing for the [MenuButton], then shows the [PopupMenu]. Prefer this over using [code]get_popup().popup()[/code].

members.name: ItemCount
members.summary: The number of items currently in the list.

members.name: SwitchOnHover
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], when the cursor hovers above another [MenuButton] within the same parent which also has [member switch_on_hover] enabled, it will close the current [MenuButton] and open the other one.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/checkable
rawMembers.summary: The checkable item type of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/checked
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is checked. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/disabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is disabled. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/icon
rawMembers.summary: The icon of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/id
rawMembers.summary: The ID of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/separator
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is a separator. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/text
rawMembers.summary: The text of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

signals.name: AboutToPopup
signals.summary: Emitted when the [PopupMenu] of this MenuButton is about to show.
